subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath arrived and was presented by the servant in attendance before the Face. We have answered thee through this perspicuous Tablet. We beseech God [3.5s]... ...The first person who devoted himself to philosophy was Idrís. Thus was he named. Some called him also Hermes. In every tongue he hath a special name.
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک و عرضه العبد الحاضر لدی الوجه اجبناک بهذا اللوح المبین نسئل الله
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul
